Program Listing for File trajectory.hpp
=======================================

|exhale_lsh| :ref:`Return to documentation for file <file_src_physics_synchronization_trajectory.hpp>` (``src/physics/synchronization/trajectory.hpp``)

.. |exhale_lsh| unicode:: U+021B0 .. UPWARDS ARROW WITH TIP LEFTWARDS

.. code-block:: cpp

   #pragma once
   
   #include "../world.hpp"
   
   namespace cardillo {
   namespace physics {
   
   class Trajectory {
      public:
       static void update(World& world, real_t dt);
   };
   
   }  // namespace physics
   }  // namespace cardillo
